releases.label: CSC 2.0
releases.summary: Chandra Source Catalog 2.0 (October 2019) — 317,167 unique X-ray sources (315,868 compact + 1,299 highly extended) from uniform analysis of 10,382 ACIS and HRC imaging observations released publicly through end of 2014

releases.label: CSC 2.1
releases.summary: Chandra Source Catalog 2.1 — 407,806 unique compact and extended X-ray sources (1,304,376 individual detections) from ACIS and HRC-I imaging public through end of 2021, ~730 deg2 of sky; patch release 2.1.1 (2024-10-18) corrected source names, null property values, astrometry offset units and manual astrometry flags
